name: Copy 3 - New Wallet Trigger Rules - Daily - Tasks, ToDo copy

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id AS task_id,
  t.responsible_person_id AS user_id,
  DATE(t.completed_at) AS completed_date
FROM task_managements t
WHERE
  t.status = 'completed'
  AND DATE(t.completed_at) = CURDATE()
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM wallet_transactions wt
    WHERE wt.resource_type = 'TaskManagement'
      AND wt.resource_id = t.id
      AND wt.point_type = 'daily_variable'
  );

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
SELECT
  wt.booked_member_id AS user_id,
  IFNULL(SUM(wt.amount), 0) AS credited_today
FROM wallet_transactions wt
WHERE
  wt.point_type = 'daily_variable'
  AND DATE(wt.created_at) = CURDATE()
GROUP BY wt.booked_member_id;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.responsible_person_id AS user_id,
  COUNT(*) AS total_tasks_today,
  120000 AS yearly_variable,
  24 AS total_attendance_days
FROM task_managements t
WHERE DATE(t.created_at) = CURDATE()
GROUP BY t.responsible_person_id;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.responsible_person_id AS user_id,
  COUNT(*) AS completed_tasks_today,
  120000 AS yearly_variable,
  24 AS total_attendance_days
FROM task_managements t
WHERE
  t.status = 'completed'
  AND DATE(t.completed_at) = CURDATE()
GROUP BY t.responsible_person_id;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.user_id AS user_id,
  COUNT(*) AS total_todos_today,
  120000 AS yearly_variable,
  24 AS total_attendance_days
FROM todos t
WHERE DATE(t.created_at) = CURDATE()
GROUP BY t.user_id;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.user_id AS user_id,
  COUNT(*) AS completed_todos_today,
  120000 AS yearly_variable,
  24 AS total_attendance_days
FROM todos t
WHERE
  t.status = 'completed'
  AND DATE(t.updated_at) = CURDATE()
GROUP BY t.user_id;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO wallet_transactions (
  transaction_type,
  amount,
  booked_member_id,
  wallet_id,
  resource_type,
  resource_id,
  remarks,
  earned_at,
  point_type,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  'credit',
  {{ $json.points }},
  {{ $json.user_id }},
  (SELECT id FROM wallets WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }} LIMIT 1),
  'TaskDailyReward',
  NULL,
  '{{ $json.remark }}',
  UTC_TIMESTAMP(),
  'daily_task_reward',
  UTC_TIMESTAMP(),
  UTC_TIMESTAMP()
);

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
UPDATE wallets
SET available_amount = available_amount + {{ $json.points }},
    credited_amount = credited_amount + {{ $json.points }},
    updated_at = UTC_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }};

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query: SELECT * from task_managements ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  t.opportunity_id,
  t.responsible_person_id AS user_id
FROM task_managements t
WHERE 
  t.opportunity_id IS NOT NULL
  
  -- Only last month records
  AND YEAR(t.created_at) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 0 MONTH)
  AND MONTH(t.created_at) = MONTH(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 0 MONTH)

  -- Prevent duplicate reward
  AND t.opportunity_id NOT IN (
      SELECT resource_id
      FROM wallet_transactions
      WHERE resource_type = 'Opportunity'
      AND point_type = 'opportunity_reward'
  );

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:

  transaction_type,
  amount,
  booked_member_id,
  wallet_id,
  resource_type,
  resource_id,
  remarks,
  earned_at,
  point_type,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  'credit',
  {{ $json.points }},
  {{ $json.user_id }},
  (SELECT id FROM wallets WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }} LIMIT 1),
  'Opportunity',
  {{ $json.opportunity_id }},
  '{{ $json.remark }}',
  UTC_TIMESTAMP(),
  'opportunity_reward',
  UTC_TIMESTAMP(),
  UTC_TIMESTAMP()
);

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database

parameters.query:
UPDATE wallets
SET 
  credited_amount = credited_amount + {{ $json.points }},
  available_amount = available_amount + {{ $json.points }},
  updated_at = UTC_TIMESTAMP()
WHERE user_id = {{ $json.user_id }};
